The '''Polith system''' was a 7-planet system in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories. It contained the planet [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. Before contact with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]], native to Thyferra, had already colonized other celestial bodies in the Polith system. During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] the system was the [[Battle of the Polith system|site of a battle]] between the Galactic Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the system was governed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kyl Ransen]].
